description: Analysis SOP & best practices for assay selection and environment-specific preprocessing.

sops.title: 16S 扩增子 vs Shotgun 宏基因组选型

decision.if: Need functional pathways (KEGG/COG/GO), AMR, strain/MAG, or unbiased discovery
Only community composition / cheap large cohort / well-characterized primers
limitations: Limited function; PICRUSt-like inference is hypothesis-generating only

decision.note: Escalate from 16S if pathways or biomarkers need functional support

checklist: State primary endpoint: taxonomy-only vs taxonomy+function
Budget / depth: 16S cheaper; shotgun needs deeper coverage for rare taxa/MAGs
Host DNA expected? Plan host depletion for host-associated shotgun
Metadata groups ready for differential analysis?

sops.title: 肠道 / 宿主相关样品预处理
steps: Raw QC: FastQC/MultiQC — track Q20/Q30, adapter content
Trim: fastp or Trimmomatic (Q20-oriented qualify / length filter)
Host removal: Bowtie2/KneadData against host genome index (paths.host_index)
Taxonomy: Kraken2 and/or MetaPhlAn; dual-path if configured
Function (shotgun): HUMAnN3 / DIAMOND→eggNOG for KEGG/COG
Stats: Alpha/Beta diversity + differential (metadata groups required)
pitfalls: High host DNA masquerades as low microbial diversity

sops.title: 土壤样品预处理策略
steps: Expect high eukaryotic / plant DNA — consider host/plant depletion if relevant
QC + aggressive adapter trim; soil libraries often have inhibitor-driven unevenness
Prefer MEGAHIT for complex assemblies; MetaBAT2 + CheckM2 for MAGs
Taxonomy: Kraken2 with broad DB; GTDB-Tk on MAGs
Function: DIAMOND/eggNOG; watch AMR/N-cycle pathways
Diversity: rarefaction / even sampling depth before Alpha/Beta

sops.title: 海洋 / 水体样品预处理策略
steps: QC/trim; document filter size / collection metadata
Often low host but high viral fraction — consider ViWrap/PhaBOX when virome asked
Taxonomy with marine-aware or broad DBs; avoid gut-only interpretation
Assembly: MEGAHIT; binning + CheckM2; GTDB-Tk for prokaryotic MAGs
Function: focus carbon/nitrogen/sulfur pathway annotations
pitfalls: Viral DNA may dominate; prokaryote-only DBs under-classify

sops.title: MAG QC 门控（CheckM2 → GTDB-Tk / Bakta）
steps: Assemble (MEGAHIT/metaSPAdes) → bin (MetaBAT2/MaxBin2)
CheckM2: compute completeness & contamination
Gate: medium ≥50% comp / ≤10% contam; high ≥90% / ≤5%
GTDB-Tk classify_wf on passed bins
Optional Bakta annotation on high/medium quality MAGs

sops.title: 多样性与功能通路报告 SOP
steps: Alpha: Shannon / Simpson / Observed richness per sample
Beta: Bray–Curtis + PCoA/NMDS; PERMANOVA if groups exist
Function: summarize KEGG/COG/GO pathway abundances (HUMAnN3/eggNOG)
Visualize: diversity plots, heatmap, volcano; write grounded biological narrative
pitfalls: Do not claim causality from cross-sectional diversity alone
